content: We can frame Self-Refine's single-perspective iterative self-improvement pipeline as a baseline to anchor multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid framework that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no additional training or external data while resolving its limitation of getting stuck in local optima from consistent self-feedback. This hybrid design splits the refinement process into early-stage multi-perspective divergent reflection to surface blind spots, and late-stage single-perspective convergent iterative refinement to lock in improved output quality.
